revenue.no_data: Babu bayanan da ake da su!

nearby.title: Kasuwancin da ke Kusa
nearby.subtitle: Gano kasuwanci da hidimomi kusa da kai
nearby.location_permission_denied: An ki amincewa da wuri. Da fatan za a kunna hidimomin wuri.
nearby.location_unavailable: Wuri ba ya nan. Sake gwadawa.
nearby.location_timeout: Neman wuri ya kare lokaci. Sake gwadawa.
nearby.showing_businesses: Ana nuna kasuwanci a cikin kilomita {{distance}} daga wurin ka
nearby.no_businesses_found: Ba a sami kasuwanci kusa ba
nearby.no_businesses_message: Babu kasuwanci a cikin kilomita {{distance}} daga wurin ka

products.no_products_desc: Fara ƙara kayayyaki cikin ma'ajin ka
products.name: Sunan Kaya
products.tags_hint: Danna Enter ko waƙafi don ƙara alama. Zaɓi daga shawarwarin ƙasa.
products.images_hint: Za ka iya loda hotuna har 10. Hoto na farko zai zama babban hoto.
products.delete_confirm_desc: Ka tabbata kana son share "{{name}}"? Ba za a iya soke wannan aiki ba.

errors.max_images: Za ka iya loda hotuna har {{max}}

settings.no_low_stock: Duk kayayyaki suna da isasshen kaya.
settings.verify_business_desc: Shigar da lambar lasisin kasuwancin ka domin mu tabbatar da shi tare da hukumar da ta dace a kasarka.
settings.verification_failed: Tabbatarwa ta kasa. Duba lambar lasisi.
settings.verification_failed_detail: Mun kasa tabbatar da wannan lambar lasisi.
settings.commission_hint: 0 = babu kwamin. Ana biyan dillali kai tsaye daga tallace-tallacen da aka biya ta hannun JamiiWallet (PICKUP kawai a yanzu).
settings.import_dealer_desc: Kunna idan kasuwancinka na iya shigo da kaya daga ƙasashen waje - za ka ga buƙatun shigo da kaya daga masu saye.
settings.imports_enabled: An kunna a matsayin mai shigo da kaya - za ka ga buƙatun shigo da kaya.
settings.imports_disabled: An kashe a matsayin mai shigo da kaya.
settings.agriculture_dealer_desc: Kunna idan kasuwancinka na sayar da amfanin gona da yawa - za ka ga yarjejeniyoyin girbi daga masu saye.
settings.agriculture_enabled: An kunna a matsayin mai sayar da amfanin gona - za ka ga yarjejeniyoyin girbi.
settings.agriculture_disabled: An kashe a matsayin mai sayar da amfanin gona.
settings.share_store_desc: Kantinarka na da adireshi nasa da za ka iya raba a ko'ina - ba a bukatar jamiikazini.com/store/...

storefront.no_catalog: Wannan kasuwanci bai riga ya ƙara kayayyaki ko hidimomi ba.
storefront.not_found: Ba a sami wannan kasuwanci ba.
storefront.switch_cart_confirm: Kwandon ka na da kayayyaki daga wani kasuwanci. Fara sabon kwando?
storefront.offer_price_required: Shigar da farashin da kake ba da shawara.
storefront.offer_sent: An aika tayin ka ga mai siyarwa.
storefront.offer_price_placeholder: Farashin da kake ba da shawara

advertise.heading: Yi Talla ga Kasuwancin Ka
advertise.description: Nuna kasuwancin ka ko kaya a shafin farko na Jamiikazini domin karin abokan ciniki su same ka.
advertise.product_label: Kayan da za a talla (na zaɓi)
advertise.request_success: An tura bukata. Biya bashin domin kunna tallar ka.
advertise.mine_empty: Har yanzu ba ka nemi talla ba.

requests.heading: Bukatun Abokan Ciniki
requests.description: Abokan ciniki na kusa suna neman kayayyaki - amince da bukata domin yi musu hidima.
requests.empty: Babu bukatun abokan ciniki a yanzu.
requests.select_product: Zaɓi kayan da suka dace da naka
requests.select_product_first: Da fatan za a zaɓi kaya tukuna.
requests.claim_success: Ka amince da wannan bukata - za a kai mai saye zuwa gare ka.
requests.claim_failed: An kasa amincewa da wannan bukata.

offers.heading: Tayin Farashi
offers.description: Masu saye suna ba da shawarar farashi daban-daban akan kayanka - karɓa, ƙi, ko aika tayin mayarwa.
offers.no_offers_sent: Ba ka taɓa aika wani tayi ba tukuna.
offers.add_to_cart_at_offer_price: Ƙara zuwa Kwando akan Farashin Tayi
offers.added_to_cart: An ƙara zuwa kwando akan farashin tayi.

import_requests.title: Shigo da Kaya daga Ƙasashen Waje
import_requests.subtitle: Bayyana kayan da kake son a shigo da su - 'yan kasuwa masu shigo da kaya za su ba da farashi da kimanin lokaci.
import_requests.description_placeholder: Misali: Wayoyin hannu iri X, ƙayyadaddun bayanai...
import_requests.request_sent: An aika buƙatarka ga masu shigo da kaya.
import_requests.request_failed: An kasa aika buƙata. Sake gwadawa.
import_requests.no_requests: Ba ka taɓa aika buƙatar shigo da kaya ba tukuna.
import_requests.incoming_description: Masu saye suna neman masu shigo da kaya - bayar da farashi da kimanin kwanaki don karɓar buƙata.
import_requests.incoming_empty: Babu buƙatun shigo da kaya a yanzu.
import_requests.claim_success: Ka karɓi wannan buƙata - mai saye zai ga farashinka.
